title: Extended Multiview Model Training
description: Training the extended (video-conditioned) multiview diffusion model with latent conditioning across N camera views.

primary_classes.name: MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel
use_cases: Encode multi-view video to latent space
Compute training loss with multi-view CP support
Denoise noisy latent with video latent conditioning
Add condition video indicator and input mask
Generate samples from batch with condition latent

primary_classes.name: FSDPExtendDiffusionModel
primary_classes.note: Decorated with @diffusion_fsdp_class_decorator; no additional methods — wraps parent for FSDP distributed training

primary_classes.name: VideoExtendMultiviewGeneralDIT
use_cases: Accept extended in_channels (+1 for condition mask)
Optionally concatenate pose condition to input

use_cases.name: Encode Multi-View Video to Latent
steps: Rearrange B C (V T) H W -> (B V) C T H W

use_cases.name: Decode Latent to Multi-View Video
steps: Rearrange B C (V T) H W -> (B V) C T H W

use_cases.name: Compute Training Loss
steps: Check is_image_batch: disable CP if true
If video + CP enabled: enable cp_group on net
Rearrange x0 and epsilon for multi-view CP split
Scale kendall_loss by CP world size if loss_reduce == 'sum'
If CP enabled: rearrange + split_inputs_cp for indicator, augment_latent, gt_latent
Replace condition region in x0 prediction with gt_latent
Return VideoDenoisePrediction(x0, eps, logvar, net_in, xt, x0_pred_replaced)

use_cases.name: Add Condition Video Indicator and Input Mask
steps: Rearrange for multi-view: (B V) C T H W
Branch on condition_location: first_n (inference) sets [:num_condition_t]=1, first_random_n (training) samples random num_condition_t
Rearrange back to B C (V T) H W
Create condition_video_input_mask: ones_padding * indicator (cond) or zeros_padding (uncond)
broadcast_condition(condition) across TP and CP ranks

use_cases.name: Prepare CFG x0 Function
steps: Set uncondition.video_cond_bool = False (or True without input-frame guidance)

use_cases.name: Generate Samples from Batch
use_cases.method: generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, seed, state_shape, num_steps, condition_latent, ...)
steps: If image batch: delegate to super().generate_samples_from_batch
Generate x_sigma_max noise with seeded generator
If CP: split x_sigma_max across CP group
If CP: cat_outputs_cp to reassemble samples

use_cases.name: Forward Pass Through DiT (VideoExtendMultiviewGeneralDIT)
steps: If DataType.VIDEO: assert condition_video_input_mask not None
If CP enabled: rearrange mask B C (V T) -> B C V T, split_inputs_cp on seq_dim=3, rearrange back
If condition_video_pose provided (and trimmed to T): append to input_list

important_notes: Multi-view tensor layout: B C (V T) H W — views interleaved in temporal dimension
Context Parallel (CP) splits temporal dimension across GPU ranks; rearrange to (B V) C T H W first to split per-view frames
condition_location='first_n' used at inference; 'first_random_n' used at training for random conditioning
VideoExtendMultiviewGeneralDIT adds +1 input channel for the binary condition mask (and optionally +1 for pose)
FSDPExtendDiffusionModel is identical to MultiviewExtendDiffusionModel but wrapped for FSDP sharding
CFG guidance: x0 = cond_x0 + guidance * (cond_x0 - uncond_x0); dual-guidance variant also supported
